name: Blue Lu Barker
abstract: Louisa "Blue Lu" Barker (née Louise Dupont) (November 13, 1913 – May 7, 1998) was an American jazz and blues singer. Her better-known recordings include "Don't You Feel My Leg" (1938), which she wrote with her husband; "Georgia Grind"; and "Look What Baby's Got for You".

works_created.t: Don't You Feel My Leg (Don't You Get Me High)

about_quotes.speaker: David Torkanowsky
about_quotes.evidence: His wife, Blue Lu Barker, is cited by Billie Holiday as being one of her major early influences...
about_quotes.doc_title: David Torkanowsky interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, New York, September 26, 2019
